global_context.scene_description: A photorealistic outdoor scene of Ashton, the lean-fit owner of a Phoenix HVAC company, squatting on his haunches next to an outdoor residential AC condenser unit, hand resting on the side of the unit, looking up and slightly toward the camera-right at the bright Phoenix sun. He matches the reference image: lean fit white male in his mid-30s, short brown hair under a grey ASH trucker-style cap with a tan ASH patch, dark sunglasses, light stubble, sleeve tattoos visible on both arms, wearing a grey heather t-shirt with the small ASH logo on the left chest, dark cargo work pants. The setting is a residential side yard of a Phoenix home, tan stucco wall behind, gravel landscaping, saguaro and palo verde in middle distance. Late afternoon intense Phoenix sun from upper right, casting strong shadows. Visible heat haze on the horizon. The mood is: he's diagnosing this system BEFORE summer breaks it. Calm, hands-on, professional, but the sun pressure is real. Photorealistic, shot on 50mm lens, Ashton in sharp focus.
global_context.weather_atmosphere: warm, dry, heat haze, summer approaching

lighting.source: low intense Phoenix sun from upper right
lighting.quality: harsh, directional, with sun glare on cap and sunglasses

composition.camera_angle: eye-level, slight 3/4 view, Ashton in profile-quarter facing the unit
composition.framing: medium, three-quarter body shot of Ashton with the AC unit beside him
composition.depth_of_field: shallow-medium, Ashton in sharp focus, background gently blurred
composition.focal_point: Ashton's face and his hand on the unit

the intense sun and heat haze make 'before summer breaks it' visceral
ASH cap and shirt logo establish brand subtly without dominating
